english: to capture / to record / to grasp / to comprehend / to seize
notes: Can mean both physically capturing/seizing something and mentally grasping/understanding it, as well as recording data in a system.

sentences.german: Die Polizei erfasst alle Daten der Unfallbeteiligten.
sentences.english: The police record all data of those involved in the accident.

sentences.german: Das System hat die neuen Kundendaten noch nicht erfasst.
sentences.english: The system has not yet recorded the new customer data.

sentences.german: Er hat die Bedeutung des Problems sofort erfasst.
sentences.english: He immediately grasped the significance of the problem.
